name: School RPG||Choice based text game||
description:
Do you like games? Hell yeah you do! Do you like chat bots? Hell fucking yeah you do! So you come to right bot! This is an School RPG game what's the difference? I already have written the stories.. inspiration from novels like COTE, Tomodachi game, Liar game ETC! So enjoy and try being the best...or worst.
------------------------------------------------
*"I'm trying to try something new other than a character so...A SCENERIO! But of course with my twist or else what's the point.. Besides I noticed that there aren't any actual good school RPG bot let alone turning it into a story based bot...I know it took but believe me I haven't finished the story myself..so if there's any other issue, feel free to tell. And Yes you can complete the story or just play like a regular scenerio bot"*
------------------------------------------------
"Of course the discription is closed, you want spoilers?? Idiot" -Painiskool
